description: routes DSL drawing resources and custom actions — idiomatic Rails routing
input:
Rails.application.routes.draw do
  resources :posts do
    member do
      post :publish
      delete :unpublish
    end
    collection do
      get :drafts
    end
  end

  resources :users, only: %i[ show edit update ] do
    resource :avatar, only: %i[ show create destroy ]
  end

  root 'posts#index'
end
